title: thelypteris malangae var. sitiorum
intro: Thelypteris malangae var. sitiorum, also known as the Sitiorum Thelypteris fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris malangae var. sitiorum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, infusions, and topical applications, which are used to promote wound healing, reduce pain, and alleviate respiratory problems.
